questions.question: Ek parking attendant ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Traffic flow ko manage karna aur parking spaces assign karna

questions.explanation: Parking attendant ka mukhya kaam traffic flow ko smooth rakhna aur drivers ko available parking spaces tak guide karna hai.

questions.question: Traffic management ki importance kya hai?

options.A: Sirf traffic jam se bachne ke liye
options.B: Safety badhane, congestion kam karne aur access improve karne ke liye
options.D: Road maintenance cost kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Effective traffic management se accidents kam hote hain, traffic flow smooth rehta hai aur logon ko jagah tak pahunchne mein aasani hoti hai.

questions.question: Parallel parking ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Gaadiyon ko ek dusre ke saamne park karna
options.B: Road ke kinare, road ke parallel gaadi park karna
options.C: Multi-level parking mein gaadi park karna

questions.explanation: Parallel parking mein gaadi ko road ke edge ke saath, uske parallel park kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek traffic marshal ko kaisa uniform pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Bright-coloured, reflective vest ke saath uniform

questions.explanation: Reflective vest wala bright-coloured uniform visibility badhata hai, khaaskar kam roshni mein, jo marshal ki safety ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Foundation level par parking aur traffic management course ka main objective kya hai?

options.A: Advanced parking software develop karna sikhana
options.B: Basic traffic control techniques aur safety protocols sikhana
options.C: Smart city parking solutions design karna
options.D: International traffic laws ko master karna

questions.explanation: Foundation level par focus basic concepts, practical skills aur safety par hota hai jo daily operations ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Kisi busy commercial complex mein traffic congestion ko kam karne ka sabse effective tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Entry aur exit points par efficient traffic flow management karna
options.D: Drivers ko aur tez drive karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Effective traffic flow management, jaise clear signage aur marshals ki help se, entry aur exit par congestion kam hota hai.

questions.question: Handicapped parking space mein park karne ke kya rules hain?

options.A: Koi bhi park kar sakta hai agar jagah khali ho
options.B: Sirf woh log jinhe authorized disability permit mila ho
options.D: Subah ke samay koi bhi park kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Handicapped parking spaces specially design kiye jaate hain disabled logon ke liye aur unhe sirf authorized permit holders hi use kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek parking attendant ki role mein customer service kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf tips collect karne ke liye
options.B: Positive user experience create karne aur facility ki reputation maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Apne kaam ko aur mushkil banane ke liye
options.D: Sirf complaints handle karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service se users khush rehte hain aur facility ki positive image banti hai.

questions.question: Angle parking kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Gaadi ko road ya curb se ek angle par park karna
options.C: Gaadi ko dusri gaadi ke peeche park karna
options.D: Gaadi ko underground parking mein park karna

questions.explanation: Angle parking mein gaadi ko curb ya road se 30-60 degree ke angle par park kiya jaata hai, jo parallel parking se zyada spaces accommodate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek driver parking rules follow nahi kar raha hai, toh parking attendant ka pehla action kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Unki gaadi ko tow karwa dena
options.B: Unse verbal argument karna
options.C: Politely rule explain karna aur corrective action suggest karna

questions.explanation: Pehla step hamesha polite communication aur education hona chahiye, taaki driver ko rule samajh mein aaye.

questions.question: Multi-level parking facility ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Limited space mein zyada gaadiyan park karna
options.C: Gaadiyon ko tez chalane ki permission dena

questions.explanation: Multi-level parking se kam zameen mein bahut zyada gaadiyan park ki ja sakti hain, jo shehron mein bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Valet parking mein parking attendant ki kya responsibility hoti hai?

options.A: Sirf gaadi ki keys collect karna
options.B: Customer ki gaadi ko safely park karna aur wapas karna

questions.explanation: Valet parking mein attendant customer ki gaadi ki responsibility leta hai aur use park karke wapas karta hai, safety aur efficiency ke saath.

questions.question: Ek parking facility mein pedestrian safety kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf children ki safety ke liye
options.B: Accidents rokne aur sabhi users ke liye safe environment provide karne ke liye
options.C: Gaadiyon ko tez chalane ke liye
options.D: Parking spaces ko kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Pedestrian safety har jagah important hai, khaaskar parking facilities mein jahan gaadiyan aur log ek saath move karte hain. Isse accidents ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Peak hours mein parking facility mein traffic flow maintain karne ke liye kya strategy use ki ja sakti hai?

options.A: Sabhi entry points band kar dena
options.B: Additional traffic marshals deploy karna aur clear signage use karna
options.C: Drivers ko wait karne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Peak hours mein extra staff aur clear directions se traffic flow smooth rehta hai aur congestion kam hota hai.

questions.question: Parking management mein 'first-in, first-out' (FIFO) principle ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jo gaadi pehle aayi, woh pehle niklegi
options.B: Jo gaadi sabse badi hai, woh pehle niklegi
options.C: Jo gaadi sabse choti hai, woh pehle niklegi
options.D: Koi bhi gaadi kabhi bhi nikal sakti hai

questions.explanation: FIFO principle parking mein efficiency ke liye use hota hai, khaaskar valet parking mein, jahan gaadiyon ko is order mein move kiya jaata hai ki nikalne wali gaadiyon ko block na kiya jaaye.

questions.question: Ek parking attendant ko parking area mein kya cheezein regularly check karni chahiye?

options.B: Lighting, signage ki condition, aur koi bhi safety hazard

questions.explanation: Regular checks se parking area safe aur functional rehta hai. Lighting, signage aur hazards ko monitor karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Traffic management mein 'contra-flow' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Traffic ko ek hi direction mein chalana
options.B: Traffic ko temporarily opposite direction mein chalana, usually maintenance ya congestion ke dauraan

questions.explanation: Contra-flow traffic management ek method hai jahan traffic lanes ko temporarily reverse direction mein allow kiya jaata hai, jisse traffic jam ya construction ke time traffic flow maintain kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Traffic cones ka kya use hai?

options.B: Traffic ko divert ya guide karne aur hazards ko mark karne ke liye
options.C: Parking fees collect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Traffic cones temporary barriers ke roop mein use hote hain traffic ko direct karne ya kisi khatre ko highlight karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek 'STOP' sign ka shape aur colour kya hota hai?

options.B: Triangular, Yellow

questions.explanation: STOP signs hamesha red octagonal shape mein hote hain jo universally recognized hain.

questions.question: Reflective vest pehenna kyon zaroori hai traffic marshals ke liye?

options.B: Low light conditions mein unki visibility badhane ke liye
options.C: Unhe garmi se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Reflective vest marshals ko drivers ke liye zyada visible banata hai, khaaskar raat mein ya kharab mausam mein, jisse accidents ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Hand signal mein 'STOP' kaise indicate kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Dono haath side mein failakar
options.C: Ek haath seedha upar uthakar, hatheli driver ki taraf

questions.explanation: Traffic marshal jab ek haath seedha upar uthakar hatheli driver ki taraf rakhta hai, toh uska matlab hai 'STOP'.

questions.question: Road par yellow continuous single line ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Parking allowed hai
options.C: Overtake karna ya line cross karna allowed nahi hai

questions.explanation: Yellow continuous single line indicate karti hai ki aapko us line ko cross nahi karna hai aur overtake karna allowed nahi hai.

questions.question: Hazard warning lights (hazard indicators) ka kya use hai?

options.B: Gaadi ko park karne ke liye
options.C: Jab gaadi break down ho ya hazard create kar rahi ho, toh dusre drivers ko alert karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hazard lights sabhi indicators ko flash karte hain, jisse dusre drivers ko pata chale ki aapki gaadi ruk gayi hai ya koi khatra hai.

questions.question: Regulatory signs ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Traffic laws aur regulations ko enforce karna

questions.explanation: Regulatory signs drivers ko kya karna chahiye aur kya nahi karna chahiye, jaise speed limit, no entry, stop, etc., batate hain.

questions.question: 'No Parking' sign ka colour combination kya hota hai?

options.B: Red circle with a diagonal line over a 'P' symbol

questions.explanation: No Parking sign universally red circle, white background aur 'P' par diagonal line ke saath hota hai.

questions.question: Road par 'Zebra Crossing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Jahan pedestrians road cross kar sakte hain
options.C: Jahan gaadiyan tez chal sakti hain

questions.explanation: Zebra crossing pedestrians ke liye designated area hai road cross karne ke liye, aur drivers ko yahan rukna hota hai.

questions.question: Barrier tapes ya caution tapes ka kya use hai?

options.B: Restricted ya dangerous areas ko block off karna

questions.explanation: Barrier tapes logon ko kisi khatarnak ya restricted area mein jaane se rokne ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Traffic marshal 'slow down' ka signal kaise deta hai?

options.A: Haath ko upar neeche move karna
options.B: Haath ko gol gol ghumana
options.C: Ek haath ko neeche ki taraf ghumana (palm facing down)

questions.explanation: Slow down signal mein marshal ek haath ko neeche ki taraf ghumata hai, hatheli neeche ki taraf hoti hai.

questions.question: Temporary traffic control ke liye sabse suitable device kaun sa hai, khaaskar construction sites par?

options.B: Traffic cones aur temporary barriers

questions.explanation: Construction sites par traffic ko divert ya control karne ke liye traffic cones aur temporary barriers sabse effective aur flexible hote hain.

questions.question: Arrow signs ka kya purpose hai parking facilities mein?

options.B: Drivers ko parking spaces, entry/exit, aur directions provide karna

questions.explanation: Arrow signs parking facilities mein navigation ke liye bahut useful hote hain, jo drivers ko sahi rasta dikhate hain.

questions.question: Agar traffic light kaam nahi kar rahi hai, toh drivers ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Use 'all-way stop' ki tarah treat karna aur savdhani se proceed karna

questions.explanation: Jab traffic light kaam nahi karti, toh us intersection ko 'all-way stop' ki tarah treat kiya jaata hai, jahan sabhi directions se aane wale drivers ko rukna hota hai aur phir turn-by-turn proceed karna hota hai.

questions.question: Warning signs ka colour aur shape kya hota hai?

options.B: Yellow diamond, black text/symbols

questions.explanation: Warning signs hamesha yellow diamond shape mein hote hain jismein black symbols ya text hote hain, jo aage aane wale khatre ya condition ke baare mein alert karte hain.

questions.question: Road par solid white line ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Lane change allowed nahi hai

questions.explanation: Solid white line indicate karti hai ki lane change karna allowed nahi hai, drivers ko apni lane mein rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Traffic marshal ka 'proceed' signal kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Ek haath ko side mein lehrana (palm facing forward)

questions.explanation: Proceed signal mein marshal ek haath ko side mein extend karta hai aur use lehrata hai, jo drivers ko aage badhne ka signal deta hai.

questions.question: Parking lot mein entry point par kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Gaadi ka type, license plate aur koi damage

questions.explanation: Entry par gaadi ki basic details check karna security aur record-keeping ke liye zaroori hai, taaki baad mein koi problem na ho.

questions.question: Pedestrian walkways parking area mein kyon zaroori hain?

options.B: Pedestrians ko gaadiyon se alag, safe passage provide karne ke liye
options.C: Gaadiyon ko slow down karne ke liye
options.D: Parking spaces kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dedicated pedestrian walkways se pedestrians safely move kar sakte hain aur gaadiyon se unka takrav kam hota hai.

questions.question: Ek parking attendant ko parked vehicles ki security kaise ensure karni chahiye?

options.B: Regular rounds lagakar, suspicious activity report karke aur parking rules enforce karke
options.D: Drivers ko bolna ki woh apni gaadi khud dekhein

questions.explanation: Physical presence, vigilance aur rules enforce karna parking lot mein security maintain karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Handicapped parking spaces ko kaise identify kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Wheelchair symbol aur blue background se mark karke

questions.explanation: Handicapped parking spaces universally blue background par white wheelchair symbol se mark kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Parking lot mein proper lighting kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf electricity bill badhane ke liye
options.B: Safety badhane, visibility provide karne aur crime rokne ke liye
options.D: Traffic lights ki zaroorat na pade

questions.explanation: Achhi lighting se drivers aur pedestrians ko acche se dikhta hai, accidents kam hote hain aur facility zyada secure lagti hai.

questions.question: Agar parking lot mein koi suspicious package dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use uthakar side mein rakh dena
options.B: Turant authorities ko inform karna aur area evacuate karna
options.D: Uski photo leke social media par dalna

questions.explanation: Suspicious packages ko hamesha serious lena chahiye aur authorities ko inform karke area ko safe karna chahiye.

questions.question: Valet parking mein keys ka management kaise hona chahiye?

options.A: Sabhi keys ko ek hi jagah rakhna
options.B: Keys ko securely store karna aur proper tracking system maintain karna
options.C: Keys ko gaadi mein hi chhod dena
options.D: Keys ko customer ke paas hi rehne dena

questions.explanation: Keys ki proper handling aur tracking system se security badhti hai aur gaadiyon ki misplacement ya theft ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Parking lot mein speed limits kyon enforce kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Drivers ko bore karne ke liye
options.B: Pedestrian safety ensure karne aur accidents rokne ke liye
options.C: Parking spaces jaldi khali karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Low speed limits parking lots mein pedestrians aur gaadiyon ki safety ke liye crucial hain.

questions.question: Agar parking facility mein koi gaadi leak kar rahi ho (oil/fuel), toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Leakage ko absorb karne ke liye sand ya absorbent material use karna aur maintenance ko inform karna

questions.explanation: Leakage se slip hazard aur environmental damage ho sakta hai, isliye turant absorbent use karna aur maintenance ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Parking lot design mein 'one-way' traffic flow ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Traffic congestion kam karna aur collisions rokna

questions.explanation: One-way traffic flow se drivers ko clear direction milti hai, jisse confusion kam hota hai aur accidents ka risk bhi kam hota hai.

questions.question: Parking attendant ko gaadi park karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Gaadi ke dimensions, surrounding obstacles aur pedestrian movement ka dhyaan rakhna
options.D: Gaadi ko kahin bhi park karna

questions.explanation: Careful parking se accidents aur damage se bacha ja sakta hai. Surroundings ka dhyaan rakhna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar parking ticket machine kharab ho jaaye, toh attendant ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Customers ko bina ticket jaane dena
options.B: Manual ticket provide karna ya alternative payment method batana aur maintenance ko inform karna
options.D: Customers ko gaadi wapas le jaane ko kehna

questions.explanation: Ek backup plan hona zaroori hai aur customers ko inconvenience se bachane ke liye alternative provide karna chahiye.

questions.question: Electric vehicle (EV) charging stations ko parking facility mein kahan place karna chahiye?

options.B: Clearly visible aur easily accessible areas mein

questions.explanation: EV charging stations ko accessible aur visible jagah par rakhna chahiye taaki users ko aasani ho aur unki visibility se facility ki modern image bane.

questions.question: Parking facility mein 'no idling' policy kyon enforce ki jaati hai?

options.A: Drivers ko jaldi nikalne ke liye
options.B: Air pollution aur noise pollution kam karne ke liye
options.D: Gaadiyon ko thanda rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: No idling policy environmental benefits provide karti hai aur noise pollution ko bhi kam karti hai.

questions.question: Parking lot mein fire safety ke liye kya measures hone chahiye?

options.B: Adequate fire extinguishers, clear escape routes aur fire alarms

questions.explanation: Fire safety ke liye proper equipment, clear evacuation plans aur alarms ka hona bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar parking lot mein koi gaadi galat jagah park ki gayi ho aur traffic block kar rahi ho, toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Driver ko contact karne ki koshish karna, agar na ho toh towing service ko inform karna
options.D: Gaadi ke tires deflate kar dena

questions.explanation: Pehle driver ko contact karne ki koshish karni chahiye. Agar woh available na ho toh authorized towing service ko bulana chahiye.

questions.question: Parking facility mein 'Reserved Parking' spaces ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Kisi bhi gaadi ko park karne ke liye
options.B: Specific individuals ya groups (jaise employees, VIPs) ke liye designated spaces

questions.explanation: Reserved parking spaces specific logon ke liye hote hain, jisse unhe convenience milti hai aur parking management smooth hota hai.

questions.question: Agar parking lot mein minor accident ho jaaye, toh pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Gaadiyon ko turant move kar dena
options.B: Safety ensure karna, injured logon ki help karna aur authorities ko inform karna
options.C: Photos lena aur social media par upload karna
options.D: Sirf drivers ko aapas mein settle karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Safety hamesha pehli priority honi chahiye. Injured logon ko help karna aur authorities ko inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Fire emergency ke dauraan parking facility mein kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Jahan aag lagi hai, wahan bhaagna
options.B: Alarm bajana, logon ko evacuate karna aur fire department ko call karna
options.C: Fire ko khud bujhane ki koshish karna
options.D: Apni gaadi nikal kar bhaag jaana

questions.explanation: Fire emergency mein sabse pehle alarm bajana, logon ko safe jagah par le jaana aur professional help bulana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Medical emergency hone par, parking attendant ka kya role hai?

options.B: First aid provide karna (agar trained ho), medical help bulana aur crowd manage karna
options.C: Patient ko khud hospital le jaana

questions.explanation: Attendant ko trained hone par basic first aid dena chahiye, aur professional medical help turant bulani chahiye.

questions.question: Crowd control techniques kyon important hain busy parking facilities mein?

options.B: Safety maintain karne, panic rokne aur smooth movement ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Zyada ticket sale karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Crowd control se safety maintain rehti hai, chaos se bacha jaata hai aur logon ka movement organized rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar parking lot mein koi gaadi break down ho jaaye, toh parking attendant ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Driver ko help provide karna (jaise jump start, mechanic bulana), hazard lights activate karwana aur traffic divert karna

questions.explanation: Breakdown ke time driver ko help karna aur doosre drivers ke liye area ko safe banana attendant ki responsibility hai.

questions.question: Emergency evacuation plan mein kya details honi chahiye?

options.B: Evacuation routes, assembly points, emergency contact numbers aur staff roles

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive evacuation plan sabhi zaroori details ko cover karta hai, jisse emergency mein effective response ho sake.

questions.question: Bomb threat ki situation mein parking attendant ka immediate action kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Authorities ko inform karna, facility ko evacuate karna aur search ke liye wait karna
options.D: Public announcement system par threat announce karna

questions.explanation: Bomb threat ek highly sensitive situation hai, jismein authorities ko inform karna aur evacuation sabse pehli priority hai.

questions.question: Hazardous material spill hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Area ko isolate karna, spill kit use karna (agar trained ho) aur specialized help bulana
options.D: Logon ko spill ke upar se chalne dena

questions.explanation: Hazardous material spills ko carefully handle karna chahiye. Area ko isolate karna aur experts ko bulana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Incident report kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Future reference, investigation aur safety improvements ke liye documentation
options.C: Insurance claim se bachne ke liye
options.D: Sirf management ko khush karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Incident reports se pata chalta hai ki kya hua, kaise hua aur future mein aise incidents ko kaise roka ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar koi gaadi parking lot mein jal rahi ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek fire extinguisher use karna
options.B: Turant fire department ko call karna, surrounding area evacuate karna aur khud ko safe rakhna
options.D: Pani se bujhane ki koshish karna

questions.explanation: Gaadi mein aag lagna bahut khatarnak ho sakta hai, isliye turant professional help bulana aur area ko safe karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Lost child ki situation mein parking attendant ka kya action hona chahiye?

options.B: Child ki description lena, parents ko help karna, security ko inform karna aur search shuru karna
options.D: Child ko exit gate par khada kar dena

questions.explanation: Lost child ki situation mein turant action lena aur sabhi available resources ka use karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Parking lot mein violent incident hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apni safety ensure karna, police ko inform karna aur situation ko monitor karna
options.C: Public announcement system par warning dena

questions.explanation: Violent incidents mein apni safety ko pehle rakhna aur police ko involve karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek traffic marshal ko first aid kit ke baare mein kya pata hona chahiye?

options.B: Uski location, uske contents aur basic usage

questions.explanation: First aid kit ki basic knowledge hone se emergency mein effective help provide ki ja sakti hai.

questions.question: Parking facility mein electrical outage hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency lighting activate karna, generators check karna aur customers ko guide karna
options.C: Sabhi gaadiyon ko exit karwa dena

questions.explanation: Electrical outage ke time backup systems ko activate karna aur customers ko safe rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Natural disaster (jaise earthquake) ke dauraan parking facility mein kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Gaadiyon ko andar hi rehne dena
options.B: Evacuation procedures follow karna, structure ki safety check karna aur authorities ko inform karna
options.D: Logon ko facility mein rok kar rakhna

questions.explanation: Natural disaster mein evacuation, structural integrity check aur authorities ko inform karna critical hai.

questions.question: Agar parking lot mein koi anjaan janwar (stray animal) dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Distance maintain karna, animal control ko inform karna aur uski movement monitor karna

questions.explanation: Stray animals unpredictable ho sakte hain, isliye distance maintain karna aur professional help bulana sabse safe approach hai.

questions.question: Parking facility mein security breach (jaise unauthorized entry) hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Security team ko inform karna, incident report karna aur area ko monitor karna

questions.explanation: Security breach ko turant report karna aur protocols follow karna zaroori hai. Direct confrontation se bachna chahiye jab tak trained na ho.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'Active Listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ki baat ko dhyaan se sunna, samajhna aur sahi response dena

questions.explanation: Active listening se customer ko lagta hai ki unki baat suni ja rahi hai aur problem ko behtar tareeke se solve kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek gusse wale customer ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Unse bhi gusse mein baat karna
options.B: Calm rehna, unki baat sunna, empathy dikhana aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Gusse wale customer ko handle karne ke liye patience, empathy aur problem-solving approach zaroori hai.

questions.question: Body language customer service mein kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf apni personality dikhane ke liye
options.B: Non-verbal communication ke through trust aur professionalism convey karne ke liye
options.C: Customer ko intimidate karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf physically fit dikhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Positive body language, jaise eye contact aur open posture, customer ko comfortable feel karati hai aur trust build karti hai.

questions.question: Clear communication ka kya fayda hai parking operations mein?

options.B: Misunderstandings kam karna, disputes rokna aur efficient service provide karna

questions.explanation: Clear instructions aur information se customers ko aasani hoti hai aur operations smooth rehte hain.

questions.question: Agar customer ko parking rules samajh nahi aa rahe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe baar baar wohi rule bolna
options.B: Rules ko simple language mein explain karna aur visuals (jaise signs) ka use karna
options.D: Unhe facility use karne se mana kar dena

questions.explanation: Patience ke saath rules ko explain karna aur visual aids ka use karna customers ko samajhne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'going the extra mile' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf wohi karna jo job description mein hai
options.B: Customer ki expectations se zyada provide karna, unki problem ko actively solve karna

questions.explanation: Going the extra mile se customer loyalty badhti hai aur facility ki positive image banti hai.

questions.question: Agar customer parking ticket kho de, toh kya action lena chahiye?

options.A: Unhe exit karne se rok dena
options.B: Proof of entry (jaise entry time, CCTV) check karna aur lost ticket policy follow karna

questions.explanation: Ek clear lost ticket policy hona zaroori hai jisse customer ko fair tarike se handle kiya ja sake aur revenue loss se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Parking attendant ke liye professional attire kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Authority, professionalism aur trust convey karne ke liye
options.D: Customer ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional attire se attendant credible dikhta hai aur customer us par trust karta hai.

questions.question: Feedback forms ya surveys ka kya use hai parking facility mein?

options.B: Customer satisfaction measure karna aur services improve karna
options.C: Customer ki personal information collect karna

questions.explanation: Feedback se facility ko apni strengths aur weaknesses ka pata chalta hai, jisse woh apni services ko behtar bana sakte hain.

questions.question: Conflict resolution mein 'win-win' approach ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Dono parties ke liye mutually beneficial solution nikalna
options.C: Kisi ko bhi solution na mile

questions.explanation: Win-win approach se long-term relationships maintain rehte hain aur dono parties satisfied feel karti hain.

questions.question: Telephone par customer se baat karte waqt kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Clear tone, polite language aur active listening
options.D: Sirf haan ya na mein jawab dena

questions.explanation: Telephone par communication mein tone aur clarity bahut important hai kyunki body language dikhai nahi deti.

questions.question: Agar customer galat parking spot par park kar raha ho, toh attendant ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Politely use sahi spot par guide karna aur rule explain karna
options.D: Uske gaadi ke tire mein hawa nikal dena

questions.explanation: Polite guidance aur explanation se customer ko embarrassment feel nahi hoti aur woh rule follow karta hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'follow-up' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Customer ko pareshan karne ke liye
options.B: Ensure karna ki customer ki problem solve ho gayi hai aur woh satisfied hai
options.C: Sirf extra kaam badhane ke liye
options.D: Customer se aur information nikalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Follow-up se customer ko lagta hai ki unki care ki ja rahi hai aur facility unki problems ko seriously leti hai.

questions.question: Parking attendant ko apni communication skills kaise improve karni chahiye?

options.B: Regular training, role-playing exercises aur feedback se

questions.explanation: Communication skills practice aur training se hi improve hoti hain.

questions.question: Agar customer ko parking ke charges galat lagein, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Charges ko clearly explain karna, system check karna aur agar galti ho toh rectify karna

questions.explanation: Transparency aur fairness customer satisfaction ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'empathy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Customer ke liye sorry feel karna
options.B: Customer ke perspective ko samajhna aur unki feelings ko appreciate karna
options.C: Customer ki problem ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Empathy se customer ko lagta hai ki unki baat suni aur samjhi ja rahi hai, jisse trust build hota hai.

questions.question: Automated Parking Guidance System (APGS) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Drivers ko available parking spaces tak guide karna, congestion kam karna aur time bachana
options.C: Parking attendants ki zaroorat khatam karna

questions.explanation: APGS se parking search time kam hota hai aur traffic flow improve hota hai.

questions.question: CCTV cameras parking facility mein kyon use hote hain?

options.B: Security badhane, suspicious activity monitor karne aur incident investigation mein help karne ke liye
options.C: Parking spaces count karne ke liye
options.D: Gaadiyon ko control karne ke liye

questions.explanation: CCTV surveillance security ke liye bahut important hai, jo deterrence aur evidence collection mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Smart parking solutions ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Technology ka use karke parking management ko efficient aur convenient banana

questions.explanation: Smart parking solutions mein sensors, apps aur automated systems ka use hota hai parking experience ko enhance karne ke liye.

questions.question: Electric Vehicle (EV) charging stations ki availability parking facilities mein kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf EV owners ko attract karna
options.B: EV adoption ko support karna aur sustainable transport ko promote karna

questions.explanation: EV charging infrastructure sustainable transportation ke future ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR) system ka kya use hai?

options.B: Vehicle entry/exit ko automate karna, security enhance karna aur record-keeping karna

questions.explanation: ANPR se entry/exit process fast aur secure ho jaati hai, aur manual errors kam hote hain.

questions.question: Parking facility mein LED lighting kyon prefer ki jaati hai?

options.A: Sirf zyada roshni dene ke liye
options.B: Energy efficiency, long lifespan aur better visibility ke liye

questions.explanation: LED lights energy save karti hain aur unki life zyada hoti hai, jo sustainability goals mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Mobile payment apps parking facilities mein kya convenience provide karte hain?

options.B: Cashless transactions, easy booking aur time-saving

questions.explanation: Mobile payment apps customers ke liye parking ko zyada convenient banate hain.

questions.question: Parking facility mein rain harvesting system kyon install kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf pani collect karne ke liye
options.B: Water conservation ke liye aur non-potable uses (jaise cleaning) ke liye pani provide karne ke liye
options.D: Environment ko pollute karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Rain harvesting sustainability ka ek hissa hai, jisse fresh water resources par load kam hota hai.

questions.question: Automated Valet Parking (AVP) systems ka kya potential hai?

options.B: Parking space utilization optimize karna, human error kam karna aur luxury experience provide karna
options.D: Parking attendant ki salary kam karna

questions.explanation: AVP systems parking ko zyada efficient aur futuristic banate hain, jisse space ka behtar use hota hai.

questions.question: Parking facility mein green spaces aur landscaping kyon important hain?

options.B: Aesthetic appeal badhane, heat island effect kam karne aur environmental benefits provide karne ke liye
options.C: Parking spaces kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Green spaces facility ko attractive banate hain aur environmental benefits bhi dete hain jaise air purification aur temperature regulation.

questions.question: Dynamic pricing for parking ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Demand ke hisaab se parking fees change karna

questions.explanation: Dynamic pricing se parking spaces ki availability regulate hoti hai aur peak times mein congestion kam hota hai.

questions.question: Solar panels parking facility mein kyon install kiye ja sakte hain?

options.A: Sirf shade provide karne ke liye
options.B: Renewable energy generate karna aur electricity bill kam karna
options.C: Facility ko zyada garmi dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Solar panels sustainable energy solutions provide karte hain aur operational costs kam karte hain.

questions.question: Integrated Parking Management System (IPMS) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Multiple parking functions (guidance, payment, security) ko ek platform par consolidate karna

questions.explanation: IPMS se parking operations zyada efficient aur coordinated ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Permit-based parking system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Koi bhi park kar sakta hai
options.B: Authorized users ke liye parking spaces allocate karna, overcrowding kam karna

questions.explanation: Permit systems se parking spaces ka fair distribution hota hai aur unauthorized parking kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Real-time parking availability information kis technology se possible hai?

options.B: Sensors, cameras aur data analytics se

questions.explanation: Sensors aur data analytics real-time data provide karte hain, jisse drivers ko available spaces ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Green building certifications (jaise LEED) parking facilities ke liye kyon important hain?

options.B: Environmental sustainability, resource efficiency aur healthy environment demonstrate karne ke liye
options.D: Maintenance cost kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Green certifications facility ki environmental responsibility ko showcase karte hain aur sustainable practices ko encourage karte hain.
